input.background: The failure time of a certain component is log normal distributed with μ = 5 and σ = 1.
input.question: Find the reliability of the component for a life of 50 time units.

output.answer: Substituting the numerical values of μ, σ, and t into Eq. (2.61), we compute $$\begin{aligned} R(50) & =P\left(Z>\frac{\ln 50-5}{1}\right)=P(Z>-1.09) \\ & =0.8621 \end{aligned}$$

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
